mapper.select: SELECT CCT.company_checkup_type_id , CCT.company_checkup_type_code , CCT.company_checkup_type_name , CCT.hospital_pay FROM company_checkup CC LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CCT.company_checkup_id WHERE CC.company_id = #{companyId} AND CC.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} AND CCT.type_copay = 1

SELECT E.user_id , E.employee_code , E.employee_name , E.myself , EC.support_type , EC.special_checkup , CC.reserve_date_begin , CC.reserve_date_end , CC.checkup_date_begin , CC.checkup_date_end , R.reservation_id , R.checkup_contract_sub_type_id , R.reservation_state , R.reservation_name , R.birth , R.sex , R.email , R.mobile , R.zipcode , R.address1 , R.address2 , R.employee_notes , R.desired_at , R.checkuped_at , R.confirmed_at , IFNULL(R.upgrade_pay, 0) AS upgrade_pay , IFNULL(R.support_pay, 0) AS support_pay , IFNULL(R.copay, 0) AS copay , IFNULL(R.hospital_pay, 0) AS hospital_pay , IFNULL(R.platform_pay, 0) AS platform_pay , IFNULL(R.sum_item_copay, 0) AS sum_item_copay , IFNULL(R.sum_item_discount_bill, 0) AS sum_item_discount_bill , CCT.company_checkup_type_code , CCT.company_checkup_type_name , CCST.sub_type_name , HCV.center_id , HCV.hospital_center_name , HCV.preday , RI.checkup_contract_item_id , RI.register , IFNULL(RI.copay, 0) AS item_copay , IF(RI.discount_bill, RI.discount_bill ,HC.bill) AS discount_bill , I.item_name FROM employee E JOIN employee_checkup EC ON E.user_id = EC.user_id JOIN company_checkup CC ON EC.company_checkup_id = CC.company_checkup_id AND CC.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON EC.company_checkup_type_id = CCT.company_checkup_type_id JOIN reservation R ON EC.employee_checkup_id = R.employee_checkup_id AND (R.reservation_state != 0 OR R.confirmed_at IS NULL) JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type CCST ON R.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = CCST.checkup_contract_sub_type_id JOIN checkup_contract_type CCT2 ON CCST.checkup_contract_type_id = CCT2.checkup_contract_type_id JOIN hospital_center_view HCV ON CCT2.center_id = HCV.center_id LEFT JOIN reservation_item RI ON R.reservation_id = RI.reservation_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_item CCI ON RI.checkup_contract_item_id = CCI.checkup_contract_item_id LEFT JOIN item I ON CCI.item_id = I.item_id LEFT JOIN hospital_checkup HC on I.item_id = HC.item_id WHERE E.company_id = #{companyId} AND E.employee_code = #{employeeCode} AND E.user_id = #{userId} AND R.reservation_id = #{reservationId} ORDER BY IF(CCI.register = '2', 'Z', CCI.register)

SELECT IFNULL(CCST.upgrade_pay, 0) AS upgrade_pay , IFNULL(C.support_pay, 0) AS support_pay , IFNULL(C.copay, 0) AS copay , IFNULL(C.hospital_pay, 0) AS hospital_pay , IFNULL(C.platform_pay, 0) AS platform_pay FROM checkup_contract_sub_type CCST JOIN checkup_contract_type CCT ON CCST.checkup_contract_type_id = CCT.checkup_contract_type_id JOIN company_checkup_type C ON CCT.company_checkup_type_id = C.company_checkup_type_id WHERE CCST.deleted_at IS NULL AND C.deleted_at IS NULL AND CCST.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = #{checkupContractSubTypeId}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(RI.copay), 0) AS sum_item_copay , IFNULL(SUM(RI.discount_bill), 0) AS sum_item_discount_bill FROM reservation_item RI JOIN checkup_contract_item CCI ON RI.checkup_contract_item_id = CCI.checkup_contract_item_id WHERE CCI.deleted_at IS NULL AND RI.reservation_id = #{reservationId}
SELECT reservation_id, reservation_state FROM reservation WHERE employee_checkup_id = sf_employee_checkup_id(#{userId}, #{checkupYear}) AND (reservation_state != 0 OR confirmed_at IS NULL)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO reservation_item ( reservation_id , checkup_contract_item_id , register , copay , discount_bill , created_user_id) SELECT #{reservationId} , checkup_contract_item_id , register
, IF(register = '2', copay=null, IFNULL(copay, 0)) AS copay , IF(register = '2', IF(IFNULL(discount_bill, 0) = 0, HC.bill, discount_bill), 0) AS discount_bill , #{sessionUserId} FROM checkup_contract_item LEFT JOIN hospital_checkup HC ON checkup_contract_item.item_id = HC.item_id WHERE checkup_contract_item_id IN
#{itemId}
GROUP BY checkup_contract_item_id

INSERT INTO reservation ( reservation_id , employee_checkup_id , checkup_contract_sub_type_id , reservation_state , reservation_name , birth , sex , email , mobile , zipcode , address1 , address2 , employee_notes , hospital_notes , platform_notes , upgrade_pay , support_pay , copay , hospital_pay , platform_pay , sum_item_copay , sum_item_discount_bill , registered_at , desired_at , created_user_id , updated_user_id) VALUES ( #{reservationId} , sf_employee_checkup_id(#{userId}, #{checkupYear}) , #{checkupContractSubTypeId} , #{reservationState} , #{reservationNameCrypt} , #{birth} , #{sex} , #{email} , #{mobile} , #{zipcode} , #{address1} , #{address2} , #{employeeNotes} , #{hospitalNotes} , #{platformNotes} , #{upgradePay} , #{supportPay} , #{copay} , #{hospitalPay} , #{platformPay} , #{sumItemCopay} , #{sumItemDiscountBill} , NOW() , #{desiredAt} , #{sessionUserId} , #{sessionUserId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE registered_at = NOW() , created_at = NOW() , created_user_id = VALUES(created_user_id) , updated_at = NOW() , updated_user_id = VALUES(updated_user_id)
, checkup_contract_sub_type_id = VALUES(checkup_contract_sub_type_id)
, reservation_state = VALUES(reservation_state)
, reservation_name = VALUES(reservation_name)
, birth = VALUES(birth)
, sex = VALUES(sex)
, email = VALUES(email)
, mobile = VALUES(mobile)
, zipcode = VALUES(zipcode)
, address1 = VALUES(address1)
, address2 = VALUES(address2)
, employee_notes = VALUES(employee_notes)
, hospital_notes = VALUES(hospital_notes)
, platform_notes = VALUES(platform_notes)
, upgrade_pay = VALUES(upgrade_pay)
, support_pay = VALUES(support_pay)
, copay = VALUES(copay)
, hospital_pay = VALUES(hospital_pay)
, platform_pay = VALUES(platform_pay)
, sum_item_copay = VALUES(sum_item_copay)
, sum_item_discount_bill = VALUES(sum_item_discount_bill)
, desired_at = VALUES(desired_at)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select:
SELECT I.item_id , I.item_name , I.item_desc , CCI.checkup_contract_item_id , CCI.register , CCI.copay , CCI.discount_bill FROM employee_checkup EC JOIN checkup_contract_type CCT ON EC.company_checkup_type_id = CCT.company_checkup_type_id JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type CCST ON CCT.checkup_contract_type_id = CCST.checkup_contract_type_id JOIN checkup_contract_item CCI ON CCST.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = CCI.checkup_contract_sub_type_id JOIN item I ON CCI.item_id = I.item_id WHERE CCST.deleted_at IS NULL AND CCI.deleted_at IS NULL AND CCI.register != '0' AND I.deleted_at IS NULL AND I.no_use = '0' AND EC.user_id = #{userId} AND CCI.item_id IN
#{itemId}

SELECT CCI.register , CCST.select_a_count , CCST.select_b_count , CCST.select_c_count , CCST.select_d_count , CCST.select_e_count , CCST.select_f_count , CCST.select_a_memo , CCST.select_b_memo , CCST.select_c_memo , CCST.select_d_memo , CCST.select_e_memo , CCST.select_f_memo , IC.item_class_id , IC.item_class_code , IC.item_class_name , IC2.item_category_id , IC2.item_category_code , IC2.item_category_name , I.item_id , I.item_code , I.item_name , I.item_desc , CCI.checkup_contract_item_id , CCI.checkup_contract_item_memo , CCI.copay , CCI.discount_bill , HC.bill FROM item_class IC JOIN item_category IC2 ON IC.item_class_id = IC2.item_class_id JOIN item I ON IC2.item_category_id = I.item_category_id JOIN checkup_contract_item CCI ON I.item_id = CCI.item_id JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type CCST ON CCI.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = CCST.checkup_contract_sub_type_id JOIN checkup_contract_type CCT ON CCT.checkup_contract_type_id = CCST.checkup_contract_type_id JOIN checkup_contract CC ON CCT.checkup_contract_id = CC.checkup_contract_id JOIN company_checkup C on CC.company_checkup_id = C.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN hospital_checkup HC ON HC.hospital_id = CC.hospital_id AND HC.checkup_year = C.checkup_year AND I.item_id = HC.item_id WHERE IC.deleted_at IS NULL AND IC2.deleted_at IS NULL AND I.deleted_at IS NULL AND I.no_use = 0 AND CCI.register != '0' AND CCI.deleted_at IS NULL AND CCST.deleted_at IS NULL AND CCST.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = #{checkupContractSubTypeId} ORDER BY IF(CCI.register = '2', 'Z', CCI.register) , IF(IC.item_class_code = 'F', 'Z', IC.item_class_code) , IC2.item_category_code, I.item_code

SELECT IC.item_class_id , IC.item_class_code , IC.item_class_name , IC2.item_category_id , IC2.item_category_name , I.item_id , I.item_name , I.item_desc FROM item_class IC JOIN item_category IC2 ON IC.item_class_id = IC2.item_class_id JOIN item I ON IC2.item_category_id = I.item_category_id WHERE IC.deleted_at IS NULL AND IC2.deleted_at IS NULL AND I.deleted_at IS NULL AND I.no_use = 0 ORDER BY IF(IC.item_class_code = 'F', 'Z', IC.item_class_code) , IC2.item_category_code, I.item_code
